title: Saudi Arabian Chicken Wrap
description: A flavorful and spicy chicken wrap inspired by the cuisine of Saudi Arabia. This dish is perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the Saudi Arabian spice blend, xtra-virgin olive oil, and a pinch of salt.
Add the chicken breast to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the chicken breast and cook for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Once the chicken is cooked, let it rest for a few minutes before slicing it thinly.
Warm the Arabian flatbread in the microwave for 10-15 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by placing a few slices of the cooked chicken on the flatbread, followed by a handful of crisp lettuce.
